persona.name: Sara
persona.description: Non-technical clinic administrator who needs forms for patient intake. No programming or database experience. Uses Google Forms occasionally.

initialIntent:
## Purpose
Collect intake information from new fitness coaching clients including their health history, fitness goals, and availability.

## Audience
New clients signing up for personal training or group fitness coaching.

## Exclusions
Do not collect detailed medical records — only relevant health conditions that affect exercise safety.
finalIntent:
# Fitness Coaching Client Intake Form

## Purpose
This form collects essential intake information from new fitness coaching clients to ensure safe and effective training programs. It gathers:
- **Personal contact information** for communication and scheduling
- **Health history and current conditions** that may affect exercise safety
- **Fitness goals and experience level** to tailor coaching approach
- **Availability and preferences** for scheduling sessions

## Target Audience
New clients enrolling in personal training or group fitness coaching programs who need to complete their initial intake before beginning sessions.

## Scope and Limitations
- Collects only exercise-relevant health information (not comprehensive medical records)
- Focuses on conditions that impact exercise safety and program design
- Does not replace medical clearance from healthcare providers when needed
- Information will be used to customize training programs and ensure client safety
schemaDescription: 20 fields: Full Name*, Email Address*, Phone Number*, Date of Birth*, Emergency Contact Name*, Emergency Contact Phone*, Current Fitness Experience Level*, Primary Fitness Goal*, Goal Details, Do you have any health conditions that may affect exercise?*, Health Conditions Details, Current Medications, Have you received medical clearance to exercise?, Previous Injuries, Preferred Training Type*, Desired Sessions Per Week*, Preferred Training Schedule*, Available Days, Preferred Start Date*, Additional Information
provenanceSummary: Intent updated once. 0 opinion resolutions recorded.
